title: auto totem detector
description: A simple fabric mod that allows you to detect if your opponent is using an autototem cheat or similar.
body:
>Auto Totem Detector

A simple client side fabric mod allowing you to spot autototem users in your region!


> Important note

This mod is, defenetly not perfect. There is a chance for legit people to be flagged as cheating - tho this is really unlikely, this can for example be happening if someone is holding the F key whilst hovering over a totem and switching it out very fast. DO NOT take flags from this mod as a reason to ban any player, as it could be a false flag. Use an actual SERVER SIDE anticheat for that!!!

> Usuage

by typing ```/toggleflags``` ingame, you can enable and disable flags for potential cheaters. I recommend turning this off if you are annoyed by spam, for example if you are around a lot of cheaters. 

> Support

If you happen to run into any issues, please join my discord
https://discord.gg/q8m7bxNaDF




especially usefull in cpvp (=crystal pvp)
